---
title: "Bayesian Prior Justification Report"
subtitle: "{{< meta params.trial_name >}}"
author: "{{< meta params.author >}}"
date: today
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"

params:
  prior:       null
  conflict:    null
  sensitivity: null
  trial_name:  "Clinical Trial"
  sponsor:     "Sponsor"
  author:      "Biostatistics"
  notes:       ""

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-float: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight-style: tango
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true          # single self-contained HTML file
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 4.5
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    latex-engine: xelatex
    fig-width: 7
    fig-height: 4

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false

knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dpi: 150
---

```{r setup}
library(bayprior)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

# Convenience accessors
pr   <- params$prior
cd   <- params$conflict
sa   <- params$sensitivity
has_prior <- !is.null(pr)
has_conf  <- !is.null(cd)
has_sens  <- !is.null(sa)
```

---

## Executive Summary

This report documents the Bayesian prior specification for study
**`r params$trial_name`**, prepared by **`r params$author`**
(`r params$sponsor`) and dated `r format(Sys.Date(), "%d %B %Y")`.

```{r exec-table}
if (has_prior) {
  s <- pr$fit_summary
  kable(
    data.frame(
      Item = c("Distribution family", "Elicitation method",
               "Expert / source", "Prior mean", "Prior SD",
               "95% Credible interval"),
      Value = c(
        toupper(pr$dist), pr$method, pr$expert_id,
        round(s$mean, 4), round(s$sd, 4),
        paste0("[", round(s$q025, 4), ",  ", round(s$q975, 4), "]")
      )
    ),
    col.names = c("Item", "Value"), align = "ll",
    caption = "Prior specification summary"
  )
}
```

`r if (nzchar(params$notes %||% "")) paste0("::: {.callout-note}\n**Statistician's notes:** ", params$notes, "\n:::")`

---

## Trial Information

```{r trial-info}
kable(
  data.frame(
    Field = c("Trial / Protocol", "Sponsor", "Statistician", "Report date"),
    Value = c(params$trial_name, params$sponsor,
              params$author, format(Sys.Date(), "%d %B %Y"))
  ),
  col.names = c("Field", "Value"), align = "ll"
)
```

---

## Prior Specification

### Elicitation Methodology

```{r elicitation-method}
if (has_prior) {
  kable(
    data.frame(
      Attribute = c("Quantity", "Distribution", "Method", "Expert / Source"),
      Value     = c(pr$label, toupper(pr$dist), pr$method, pr$expert_id)
    ),
    col.names = c("Attribute", "Value"), align = "ll"
  )
}
```

### Fitted Parameters

```{r fitted-params}
if (has_prior) {
  kable(
    data.frame(
      Parameter = names(pr$params),
      Value     = round(unlist(pr$params), 6)
    ),
    caption = "Fitted hyperparameters", align = "lr"
  )
}
```

### Prior Summary Statistics

```{r prior-summary}
if (has_prior) {
  s <- pr$fit_summary
  kable(
    data.frame(
      Statistic = c("Mean", "Standard deviation",
                    "2.5th percentile", "Median", "97.5th percentile"),
      Value     = round(c(s$mean, s$sd, s$q025, s$q500, s$q975), 5)
    ),
    caption = "Prior distribution summary statistics", align = "lr"
  )
}
```

### Prior Density {#sec-density}

```{r prior-density}
#| fig-cap: "Elicited prior distribution. Shaded region = 95% credible interval; dashed line = prior mean."
if (has_prior) plot(pr)
```

---

## Prior–Data Conflict Assessment

```{r conflict-check}
#| results: asis
if (!has_conf) {
  cat("::: {.callout-warning}\n",
      "No prior–data conflict diagnostics were computed for this report.\n",
      ":::\n")
}
```

```{r conflict-table}
#| eval: !expr has_conf
kable(
  data.frame(
    Diagnostic = c(
      "Box's prior predictive p-value",
      "Surprise index (standardised distance)",
      "KL divergence (prior || likelihood)",
      "Bhattacharyya overlap coefficient",
      "Conflict severity"
    ),
    Value = c(
      round(cd$box_pvalue, 4),
      round(cd$surprise_index, 4),
      round(cd$kl_prior_likelihood, 4),
      round(cd$overlap, 4),
      toupper(cd$conflict_severity)
    ),
    Interpretation = c(
      ifelse(cd$conflict_flag,
             paste0("Conflict detected (p < alpha = ", cd$alpha, ")"),
             "No conflict detected"),
      ifelse(cd$surprise_index > 3, "High surprise (> 3 SD)",
             ifelse(cd$surprise_index > 2, "Moderate surprise", "Within expected range")),
      ifelse(cd$kl_prior_likelihood > 1, "Large divergence", "Acceptable divergence"),
      ifelse(cd$overlap < 0.3, "Low overlap — concern",
             ifelse(cd$overlap < 0.6, "Moderate overlap", "Good overlap")),
      toupper(cd$conflict_severity)
    )
  ),
  caption = "Prior–data conflict diagnostics", align = "llr"
)
```

```{r conflict-callout}
#| results: asis
#| eval: !expr has_conf
sev   <- cd$conflict_severity
ctype <- switch(sev, none = "tip", mild = "warning", severe = "important", "caution")
cat(paste0("::: {.callout-", ctype, "}\n",
           "**Recommendation:** ", cd$recommendation, "\n",
           ":::\n"))
```

### Prior – Likelihood – Posterior Overlay

```{r overlay-plot}
#| fig-cap: "Overlay of prior density, scaled likelihood, and resulting posterior."
#| eval: !expr (!has_conf || !has_prior)
if (has_conf && has_prior) {
  plot_prior_likelihood(pr, cd$data_summary, show_posterior = TRUE)
}
```

---

## Sensitivity Analysis

```{r sensitivity-check}
#| results: asis
if (!has_sens) {
  cat("::: {.callout-warning}\n",
      "No sensitivity analysis was conducted for this report.\n",
      ":::\n")
}
```

### Influence of Prior Hyperparameters

```{r sensitivity-influence}
#| eval: !expr has_sens
kable(
  data.frame(
    Target    = names(sa$influence_scores),
    Range     = round(sa$influence_scores, 5),
    Sensitive = ifelse(sa$influence_scores > 0.05, "Yes", "No")
  ),
  caption = "Posterior sensitivity to prior hyperparameters",
  align   = "lrr"
)
```

### Tornado Plot

```{r tornado}
#| fig-cap: "Range of each posterior quantity across the hyperparameter grid. Wider bars = greater prior influence."
#| eval: !expr has_sens
plot_tornado(sa)
```

### Hyperparameter Influence Heatmap

```{r heatmap}
#| fig-cap: "Posterior mean across the two-dimensional hyperparameter grid."
#| eval: !expr has_sens
if (has_sens) plot_sensitivity(sa, target = sa$target[1])
```

---

## Regulatory Compliance Checklist

```{r compliance}
kable(
  data.frame(
    Requirement = c(
      "Prior elicitation method documented",
      "Distribution family and parameters specified",
      "Expert / source of prior identified",
      "Prior density plot provided",
      "Prior–data conflict assessed",
      "Conflict diagnostic statistics reported",
      "Sensitivity analysis performed",
      "Sensitivity visualisations provided",
      "Alternative priors considered",
      "Regulatory report generated"
    ),
    Status = c(
      ifelse(has_prior, "✅ Complete", "❌ Missing"),
      ifelse(has_prior, "✅ Complete", "❌ Missing"),
      ifelse(has_prior, "✅ Complete", "❌ Missing"),
      ifelse(has_prior, "✅ Complete", "❌ Missing"),
      ifelse(has_conf,  "✅ Complete", "⚠️  Not run"),
      ifelse(has_conf,  "✅ Complete", "⚠️  Not run"),
      ifelse(has_sens,  "✅ Complete", "⚠️  Not run"),
      ifelse(has_sens,  "✅ Complete", "⚠️  Not run"),
      ifelse(has_sens,  "✅ See above", "⚠️  Not run"),
      "✅ Complete"
    )
  ),
  align = "ll",
  caption = "FDA/EMA regulatory compliance checklist (FDA Guidance 2026)"
)
```

::: {.callout-note}
This checklist maps to requirements in the FDA Draft Guidance on Bayesian
Statistical Methods (2026) and the EMA Reflection Paper on the Use of
Bayesian Statistics in the Evaluation of Medicinal Products.
:::

---

## Appendix: Session Information

```{r session-info}
si <- sessionInfo()
kable(
  data.frame(
    Item  = c("R version", "bayprior version", "Quarto version", "Platform", "Date"),
    Value = c(
      paste(si$R.version$major, si$R.version$minor, sep = "."),
      as.character(utils::packageVersion("bayprior")),
      as.character(quarto::quarto_version()),
      si$platform,
      format(Sys.Date(), "%d %B %Y")
    )
  ),
  align = "ll"
)
```

---

*Report generated by the **bayprior** R package using `prior_report()`.
Methods follow O'Hagan et al. (2006), Box (1980), Schmidli et al. (2014),
Ibrahim & Chen (2000), and the FDA Draft Guidance on Bayesian Methods in
Clinical Trials (2026).*
